kinesisfirehose.deliverystream.inputform: Specifies the deserializer you want to use to convert the format of the input data. This parameter is required if `Enabled` is set to true.

kinesisfirehose.deliverystream.inputform.Description: Specifies which deserializer to use. You can choose either the Apache Hive JSON SerDe or the OpenX JSON SerDe. If both are non-null, the server rejects the request.
